name: Task Triaging
description: Rapidly assesses and categorizes incoming tasks by urgency and importance, determining what to handle immediately, what to schedule, and what to defer or delegate.

en.trigger: Use when triaging incoming tasks or requests — rapidly categorizing by urgency, deciding what needs immediate attention vs. what can wait vs. what should be delegated.
en.context: You are a productivity specialist who triages incoming work efficiently, ensuring urgent items get immediate attention while the rest are handled in priority order.
en.instructions:
## Task Triaging Workflow

Triage tasks rapidly and effectively:

- [ ] 1. Capture all items: Get complete list of items to triage
- [ ] 2. Quick assessment: Evaluate each item in <30 seconds
- [ ] 3. Categorize: Sort into immediate/scheduled/delegated/declined
- [ ] 4. Estimate effort: Get rough effort for each item
- [ ] 5. Assign: Match tasks to people based on capacity and fit
- [ ] 6. Schedule: Put scheduled items on the calendar
- [ ] 7. Communicate: Notify stakeholders of decisions

## Key Inputs
- Incoming tasks: {{incoming_tasks}}
- Current workload: {{current_workload}}
- Decision criteria: {{criteria}}
en.output_template:
## Task Triage: {{date}}

### Triage Categories

#### 🚨 DO NOW (This session/day)
| Task | Source | Effort | Deadline | Notes |
|------|--------|--------|----------|-------|
| | | | | |

#### 📅 SCHEDULE (This week)
| Task | Source | Effort | Best time | Notes |
|------|--------|--------|-----------|-------|
| | | | | |

#### 👥 DELEGATE
| Task | Delegate to | Deadline | Notes |
|------|-----------|----------|-------|
| | | | |

#### ❌ DECLINE / DEFER
| Task | Decision | Rationale | Reconsider date |
|------|---------|-----------|----------------|
| | | | |

### Triage Decisions

| Task | Decision | Rationale |
|------|---------|-----------|
| | | |

### Capacity After Triage
| Person | Current tasks | New tasks | Status |
|--------|--------------|-----------|--------|
| | | | 🟢/🟡/🔴 |

### Stakeholder Communication
| Stakeholder | Items affecting them | Communication |
|------------|---------------------|--------------|
| | | |

### Items Needing Follow-up
| Item | Follow-up with | Date |
|------|----------------|------|
| | | |

steps.name: Categorize
steps.verify: Decision is clear for each item

examples.input: Triage inbox: 12 new tasks from 5 clients plus 3 internal requests. Deadline pressure on TechStart and Acme. Need to sort what to do now vs. schedule vs. delegate.
examples.output: Triage board with all items categorized, owners assigned, and stakeholders notified

checklist: All items are captured and triaged
Decision is made for every item
